rulings.Case Title: IN RE: THE WOLF FIRM IN RE 932 HAMILTON ST. S.F., CA.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Claim To Surplus Funds By Owners Of Interest
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 26, 2016, line 1. CLAIMANT LORETTA ELIZARDE Notice Of Hearing On Claim To Surplus Funds By Owners Of Interest is continued to December 2, 2016. Claimant is ordered to serve the Notice of the Hearing on All claimants identified in the trustee's declaration at the addresses specified therein. Such Notice to be served no later than October 21, 2016 specifying the new hearing date. Proof of service to be filed no later than October 28, 2016. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ELVIS RIVERA VS. HAWK LING LOU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 26, 2016, line 2. PLAINTIFF EDWIN ALAS, ANA ALAS, HECTOR *QUINTEROS, NANCY *SEGOVIA, ARACELI *TOLAMA Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. Non-opposition filed. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL SALIBA VS. NAJIB EID SALIBA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 26, 2016, line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT PAUL SALIBA DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. The demurrer is sustained as to the fraud, promissory fraud and breach of fiduciary duty causes of action for cross-complaints to allege the amount of damages sought per CCP 425.10. Prayer seeking "not less than the minimum jurisdiction" is not sufficient. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Second Amended Cross-Complaint alleges sufficient facts to state causes of action for fraud, promissory fraud, breach of contract, breach of fiduciary duty and elder abuse. These causes of action are not uncertain. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAMANTHA LEE SETO MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. MARTHE SCHREIBER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 26, 2016, line 5. DEFENDANT MARTHE SCHREIBER DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Plaintiff's request to amend the complaint by substitution of the current Plaintiff by the owner of the property (as requested by October 17, 2016 ex-parte, continued to October 26, 2016 to give Defendant an opportunity to oppose in writing as requested) is GRANTED. The demurrer based solely on "the grounds that [current] Plaintiff lacks standing as not being the real party in interest" is moot. Plaintiff shall file and serve the amendment forthwith and Defendant to file an answer within 5 days thereafter. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHI YUEN LO VS. STEPHANIE PETERSON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 26, 2016, line 6. DEFENDANT STEPHANIE PETERSON DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. =(501/REQ)
